backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the chat application, defining types and state for messages, chatrooms, user profiles, reactions, and active users, with functions for access control, profile management, messaging, and chatroom operations.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting two implemented UI features for the PinnedVideo component: overlaying an absolute unpin (X) button at the top-right and a non-clickable Pin icon at the top-left of the video container.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Text file containing JSON summaries of all frontend source files, describing the purpose and key details of each component, hook, page, and configuration file in the project.
frontend/index.html: Root HTML entry point for the React app with viewport meta tags, cache-busting directives, and a versioned script tag loading main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React application component that sets up TanStack Router with lobby, chatroom (with messageId search param), and admin routes, hiding the header and footer on admin pages and the footer on chatroom pages.
frontend/src/components/AvatarPickerDial: Dialog component for selecting or uploading a user avatar, supporting file upload, GIF search via Giphy (with trending fallback), and avatar removal.
frontend/src/components/ChatArea.tsx: Main chat interface component that renders messages, handles sending, reply context, auto-scroll, pinned video, category badges, and deep-link scroll-to-target-message with a 3-second highlight effect.
frontend/src/components/ChatroomCard.tsx: Displays a chatroom preview card with thumbnail rendering for YouTube, Twitch, and Twitter media types, along with metadata like topic, category, live status, and message count.
frontend/src/components/CreateChatroomDi: Modal dialog for creating a new chatroom with fields for topic, description, category, and media (image upload, video URL, or Twitter post), including validation and upload progress.
frontend/src/components/ExternalLinkDisc: Confirmation dialog that warns users before navigating to an external URL, displaying the target link and offering Cancel or Continue actions.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Simple footer component displaying a copyright notice and a link to caffeine.ai with a heart icon.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: App header with the Chattr logo, an inline username editor with alphanumeric validation, an avatar picker, and a back-to-lobby button when inside a chatroom.
frontend/src/components/LoginPrompt.tsx: No-op placeholder component that renders nothing; authentication is intentionally not used in this app.
frontend/src/components/MessageBubble.ts: Renders an individual chat message with support for reactions, pinning, replies, media embeds (YouTube, Twitch, Twitter, Giphy), voice playback, link detection, and report functionality.
frontend/src/components/MessageInput.tsx: Chat input component supporting text messages, image uploads, GIF search via Giphy, voice recording, and automatic detection of YouTube/Twitch/Twitter URLs embedded in message text.
frontend/src/components/PinnedVideo.tsx: Renders a pinned YouTube or Twitch video as an embedded iframe within a chatroom, with an unpin button that calls the useUnpinVideo mutation.
frontend/src/components/VoiceMessagePlay: Audio player component for voice messages featuring a play/pause toggle, a randomized waveform bar visualization, a seek slider, and automatic pausing of other playing audio elements.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates all non-actor queries whenever the actor instance changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useDebouncedValue.ts: Generic hook that debounces a value by a configurable delay (default 300ms) using setTimeout.
frontend/src/hooks/useForceFreshChatroom: Hook that purges stale or empty cached chatroom data and forces a fresh refetch of the chatrooms query once the ICP actor becomes ready, exposing an isRecovering flag for loading state.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context (login, logout, identity, status) via a React context provider and hook, built on top of the DFINITY AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Central React Query hooks file covering chatroom listing/search/creation, message fetching/sending, reactions, image upload, voice messages, and video pinning, all wired to the ICP backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives, defines light/dark theme CSS custom properties (OKLCH color tokens), and includes mobile-specific input styles and custom voice message range input styling.
frontend/src/lib/config.ts: Exports frontend configuration constants including the Giphy API key and result limit.
frontend/src/lib/formatters.ts: Exports a single utility function `formatCompactNumber` that formats numbers into compact notation (k, M, B suffixes).
frontend/src/lib/giphy.ts: Provides functions to search Giphy by term and fetch trending GIFs, returning normalized GIF objects with preview and original URLs.
frontend/src/lib/html2canvasLoader.ts: Empty file, likely a placeholder for a lazy html2canvas loader module.
frontend/src/lib/imageCompression.ts: Client-side image compression utility that resizes and recompresses image files using a canvas, skipping GIFs/SVGs and falling back to the original if compression increases file size.
frontend/src/lib/twitterEmbedRenderer.ts: Empty file, likely a placeholder for a Twitter embed rendering module.
frontend/src/lib/twitterOEmbedPreview.ts: Fetches Twitter oEmbed JSON to extract safe preview fields (author, text, image) with in-flight deduplication and localStorage caching.
frontend/src/lib/twitterOEmbedPreviewCac: localStorage cache layer for Twitter oEmbed preview data, supporting versioned entries with a 7-day expiration and cache-key derivation from tweet IDs.
frontend/src/lib/twitterThumbnail.ts: Empty file, likely a placeholder for a Twitter thumbnail fetching module.
frontend/src/lib/twitterThumbnailCache.t: Empty file, likely a placeholder for a Twitter thumbnail cache module.
frontend/src/lib/videoUtils.ts: Utility functions for extracting video/channel IDs from YouTube, Twitch, and Twitter/X URLs and generating corresponding thumbnail and embed URLs.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDeleteChatroomsP: Password-protected admin moderation page that lists chatrooms with flagged message counts, supports filtering/searching, and allows admins to delete chatrooms via a confirmation dialog.
frontend/src/pages/ChatroomPage.tsx: Page component that loads a specific chatroom by ID, increments its view count on load, handles loading/error states, and renders the ChatArea component with an optional target message ID from query params.
frontend/src/pages/LobbyPage.tsx: Main lobby page displaying a searchable, filterable, algorithmically sorted list of chatrooms (live rooms first, then by view count), with a dialog to create new chatrooms.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining a custom design system with OKLCH-based color tokens, border radius variables, accordion keyframe animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Project state metadata for 'Chattr', a video chat/streaming app, tracking existing features (PinnedVideo overlay buttons) and a pending feature request to overlay pin/unpin controls directly on the video.
